---
number-sections: false
---

::: {.sitext}
# Supplementary Materials {.unnumbered}

::: {.si-tab-container}

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="I. Core Model"}

## I. Core Model {.unnumbered}

{{< include _dirichlet_multinomial.qmd >}}

{{< include _hierarchical_p.qmd >}}

{{< include _hierarchical_gate.qmd >}}

{{< include _beta_negative_binomial.qmd >}}

{{< include _two_state_promoter.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="II. Model Comparison"}

## II. Model Comparison & Diagnostics {.unnumbered}

{{< include _model_comparison.qmd >}}

{{< include _goodness_of_fit.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="III. Inference"}

## III. Inference Methodology {.unnumbered}

{{< include _variational_inference_primer.qmd >}}

{{< include _guide_reparam.qmd >}}

{{< include _joint_low_rank_guide.qmd >}}

{{< include _mixture_weights_svi.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="IV. Denoising & Priors"}

## IV. Denoising & Priors {.unnumbered}

{{< include _denoising.qmd >}}

{{< include _capture_prior.qmd >}}

{{< include _mean_anchoring_prior.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="V. Multi-Dataset"}

## V. Multi-Dataset Hierarchical Models {.unnumbered}

{{< include _hierarchical_datasets.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="VI. GRN Log-Normal"}

## VI. GRN-Based Log-Normal Models {.unnumbered}

{{< include _grn_biophysics.qmd >}}

{{< include _logistic_normal_multinomial.qmd >}}

{{< include _poisson_lognormal.qmd >}}

{{< include _nb_lognormal.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp_lnm_pln_robustness.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp_nbln_robustness.qmd >}}

{{< include _loadings_shrinkage_priors.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.si-tab data-tab-title="VII. Normalization & DE"}

## VII. Normalization & Differential Expression {.unnumbered}

{{< include _normalization.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp01.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp02.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp03.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp04.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp05.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp06.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp_compositional_robustness.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp07.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp08.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp09.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp10.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp11.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp12.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp13.qmd >}}

{{< include _diffexp14.qmd >}}

:::

:::

:::
